name: Cherry Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Stir together flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
3. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, melt chocolate and butter together over low heat, stirring often.
4. Lightly beat eggs with milk and vanilla extract.
5. Add the egg mixture, melted chocolate and butter mixture to the flour mixture. Stir until smooth.
6. Stir in walnuts and cherries along with any cherry juice.
7. Pour batter into a large greased 9-inch square baking pan.
8. Bake for about 1 hour and 5 minutes.
9. Cool on a rack, then cut into squares and serve plain or with vanilla ice cream or barely sweetened lightly beaten cream.
